post.description: Check if a debt position expiration.

parameters.name: debtPositionId
parameters.description: The id of debt position.

parameters.name: massive
parameters.description: Indicates if the operation is massive (true) or single (false).

parameters.name: partialChange
parameters.description: Indicates if the operation is a cumulative operation (true), which at the end of the process will invoke again the API with the parameter set to false, or complete (false).

parameters.name: paymentEventType
parameters.description: If provided, it will publish into Kafka queue the DebtPosition.

post.description: It will start the flow file ingestion returning its workflowId

parameters.name: ingestionFlowFileId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the ingestion File.

parameters.name: ingestionFlowFileType
parameters.description: IngestionFlowFileType

post.description: It will Processes Transfer classification based on the provided parameters returning its workflowId

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: the unique identifier of the organization.

parameters.name: iuv
parameters.description: the unique identifier of the payment (IUV).

parameters.name: iur
parameters.description: the identifier of the receipt associated with the payment.

parameters.name: transferIndex
parameters.description: the index of the transfer to be classified.

get.description: Retrieve the current status of a Temporal workflow by its ID.
Start send notification process (preloadFile, uploadFile, delivery and status).

parameters.name: sendNotificationId
parameters.description: The id of send notification.
